---
id: beta-users
title: "Beta users"
description: "Allow the datasource be visible to the specified beta users. The default behaviour is datasource being visible to all users if it is enabled and not visible to any user if it is not enabled."
sidebar_label: "Beta users"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/indexing-api/glean-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Beta users"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/index/v1/betausers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Allow the datasource be visible to the specified beta users. The default behaviour is datasource being visible to all users if it is enabled and not visible to any user if it is not enabled.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
